title: C'oron bel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Silverjaw.jpg|thumb]]
The '''c'oron bel''' (translated from [[Gorothite/Legends|Gorothite]] as "'''silverjaw'''") was a species of fish native to [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]].<ref name="SotE">''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''</ref>

*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
